lines.en: We need to buy some bread for tomorrow.
lines.zh: 我们需要买些面包明天吃。

lines.en: Of course. But only two pieces.
lines.zh: 当然可以。但只能选两个。

lines.en: I want this chocolate cake. It looks yummy!
lines.zh: 我要这个巧克力蛋糕。看起来好好吃！

lines.en: That is too sweet for breakfast. Pick some bread.
lines.zh: 那个当早饭太甜了。选些面包吧。

lines.en: OK. How about this red bean bread?
lines.zh: 好吧。这个红豆面包怎么样？

lines.en: Good choice. I will take the whole wheat bread.
Can we also get some croissants?
lines.zh: 我们也可以买些牛角包吗？

lines.en: I love the smell of this bakery!
lines.zh: 我喜欢这家面包店的香味！
